name: Amon.hfssSouth30
title: Surface Upward Sensible Heat Flux
description: The surface sensible heat flux, also called turbulent heat flux, is the exchange of heat between the surface and the air by motion of air.
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Amon.hfssSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
